name: video-template-viral-k-pop-dance-choreography
title: Viral K-pop Dance Choreography

title_i18n.ja: バイラルK-popダンス振り付け
title_i18n.vi: Biên đạo múa K-pop lan truyền

description: A detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 to animate a character performing a dance based on a 16-panel storyboard reference.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 为Seedance 2.0提供详细提示词，根据16格分镜参考动画角色表演舞蹈。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 為Seedance 2.0提供詳細提示詞，根據16格分鏡參考動畫角色表演舞蹈。
description_i18n.ja: 16パネルのストーリーボード参考に基づいてキャラクターにダンスをアニメーションさせるSeedance 2.0用の詳細なプロンプト。
description_i18n.ko: 16패널 스토리보드 참고를 기반으로 캐릭터가 춤을 추도록 애니메이션하는 Seedance 2.0용 상세 프롬프트입니다.
description_i18n.de: Ein detaillierter Prompt für Seedance 2.0, um eine Figur basierend auf einer 16-Panel-Storyboard-Referenz tanzen zu lassen.
description_i18n.fr: Un prompt détaillé pour Seedance 2.0 afin d'animer un personnage effectuant une danse basée sur une référence de storyboard à 16 panneaux.
description_i18n.ru: Подробный промпт для Seedance 2.0 для анимации персонажа, исполняющего танец на основе раскадровки из 16 панелей.
description_i18n.es: Un prompt detallado para Seedance 2.0 que anima a un personaje realizando un baile basado en un storyboard de referencia de 16 paneles.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Um prompt detalhado para o Seedance 2.0 animar um personagem executando uma dança baseada em um storyboard de referência de 16 painéis.
description_i18n.it: Un prompt dettagliato per Seedance 2.0 per animare un personaggio che esegue una danza basata su uno storyboard di riferimento a 16 pannelli.
description_i18n.vi: Prompt chi tiết cho Seedance 2.0 để tạo hoạt ảnh nhân vật thực hiện vũ đạo dựa trên bảng phân cảnh 16 khung hình tham khảo.
description_i18n.pl: Szczegółowy prompt dla Seedance 2.0 do animowania postaci wykonującej taniec na podstawie 16-panelowego storyboardu referencyjnego.
description_i18n.id: Prompt terperinci untuk Seedance 2.0 untuk menganimasikan karakter yang menampilkan tarian berdasarkan referensi storyboard 16 panel.
description_i18n.nl: Een gedetailleerde prompt voor Seedance 2.0 om een personage een dans te laten uitvoeren op basis van een 16-panelen storyboard referentie.
description_i18n.ar: موجه تفصيلي لـ Seedance 2.0 لتحريك شخصية تؤدي رقصة بناءً على مرجع لوحة قصة من 16 لوحة.
description_i18n.tr: 16 panelli bir storyboard referansına dayalı olarak dans eden bir karakteri canlandırmak için Seedance 2.0'a yönelik detaylı bir prompt.
description_i18n.uk: Детальний промпт для Seedance 2.0 для анімації персонажа, який виконує танець на основі раскадрування з 16 панелей.
description_i18n.en: A detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 to animate a character performing a dance based on a 16-panel storyboard reference.

query.en: viral kpop dance. Monochrome grayscale illustration, 3D-rendered character, clean instructional reference sheet, white background, comic-style cell grid layout, technical diagram aesthetic. [LAYOUT] 4×4 grid layout with a total of 16 panels. Each panel is separated by thin black border lines. Cells are numbered from 1 to 16, with consistent panel sizes. [CHARACTER] image1 (the same character appears consistently in all panels) [PANEL STRUCTURE – per cell] Top-left: bold number badge + English title text Center: full-body character pose illustration Bottom-left: English description text (3–4 lines) Overlay: directional arrows indicating movement [ARROWS / MOTION INDICATORS] Curved arrows, straight arrows, and circular rotation indicators placed around the character to show motion flow and direction. [RENDERING STYLE] Highly detailed 3D sculpted style, soft studio lighting, subtle shadows, no color, grayscale shading, clean linework, game concept art quality. [NEGATIVE] No background scenery, no color tones, no additional characters, no complex background. Use the attached image as reference. Use the attached image as reference. Create a dance video that follows the exact sequence and movements from steps 1–16 shown in the attached image. The music should be a trending tiktok song. There should be no dialogue, text, or narration. she is wearing a casual tank top with sweatpants and sneakers.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：viral kpop dance. [RENDERING STYLE] Highly detailed 3D sculpted style, soft studio lighting, subtle shadows, no color, grayscale shading, clean linework, game concept art quality. Create a dance video that follows the exact sequence and movements from steps 1–16 shown in the attached image. The music should be a trending tiktok song.
